description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Android that triggers on push to the master branch. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job to check out the code, set up JDK 11, install Android SDK, update sdkmanager, and install various Android platforms and tools. Then, install Qt for desktop and Android, Android OpenSSL, create localization, configure and build the project, and finally upload the GPXSee-armv7.apk artifact.
